title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.220 - Proceeds before county commission may be transferred to circuit court, when
text:
49.220.  Proceeds before county commission may be transferred to circuit court, when. — If a majority of the commissioners of the county commission shall be interested in any cause or proceeding pending before them, or related to either party, the same shall be certified with the original papers to the circuit court of the county, which shall proceed thereon to final judgment and determination in like manner as the county commission should have done.
(RSMo 1939 § 2481, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2079; 1919 § 2575; 1909 § 4082 
Effective  1-01-85
